text: uqera lemshe umaleyl yeya 'imeyh mimashekan zimena lemeymar
maleyl 'im beney yiserael veteymar lehon enash arey yeqareyv minekhon qurebana qodam yeya min be'ira min torey umin 'ana teqarevun yat qurebanekhon
